skills.name: Psychic Pressure
skills.description: Concentrate on the tip of your hand to inflict continuous damage with psychokinesis. Chance to stun enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
Max Duration: 5 seconds
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP per second
50% chance of inflicting Stun

skills.name: Swap
skills.description: Swaps your position with that of a selected enemy. The swapped enemy becomes immobilized.
skills.effect_text:
Targets: CaptionRatio
Maximum Distance: 20
Debuff Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Magnetic Force
skills.description: Inflict damage on multiple enemies by pulling them together to a targeted area, causing them to collide with each other.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Raise
skills.description: Lift nearby enemies up into the air. Enemies in the air are temporarily detected as a Flying-type and cannot evade attacks. Removes nearby [Heavy Gravity] tiles when casted.

skills.name: Gravity Pole
skills.description: Attacks by creating a straight line of gravitational force that pulls the enemies together.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x2 per 1 second
Target: CaptionRatio
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP per second
Maximum Duration: 10 second(s)

skills.name: Heavy Gravity
skills.description: Increases the gravitational force on the targeted area to inflict psychokinesis damage. Flying-type monsters within the affected area are changed to ground-type and Raise magic circles around the affected area are removed.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 5 seconds

attributes.name: Psychic Pressure: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Psychic Pressure] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Magnetic Force: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Magnetic Force] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Gravity Pole: Evasion
attributes.description: * Increases evasion by 50 per attribute level while using [Gravity Pole]

attributes.name: Magnetic Force: Stun
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Magnetic Force] have a 5% chance

per attribute level to become afflicted with [Stun] for 1.5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Gravity Pole: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Gravity Pole] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Psychic Pressure: Focus
attributes.description:
* Reduces damage received while using [Psychic Pressure] by 10%

*Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Gravity Pole: Slow
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Gravity Pole] are afflicted with the [Slow] debuff for a 3-second duration

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Heavy Gravity: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Heavy Gravity] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Heavy Gravity: Slow Movement
attributes.description:
* Movement speed of enemies in range of [Heavy Gravity] decreases by 2 per attribute level

*Will not apply to large or Boss monster

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: [Arts] Heavy Gravity: Distort
attributes.description:
* When [Heavy Gravity] and [Raise] are stacked in the same location, a fused magic circle appears to immobilize enemies

and enemies are lifted into the air then dropped when the magic circle's duration is over.

attributes.name: [Arts] Heavy Gravity: Distort
attributes.description:
* When [Heavy Gravity] and [Raise] are stacked in the same location, a fused magic circle appears to immobilize enemies

and enemies are lifted into the air then dropped when the magic circle's duration is over.

attributes.name: [Arts] Psychic Pressure: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Psychic Pressure] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Magnetic Force: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Magnetic Force] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Gravity Pole: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Gravity Pole] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Heavy Gravity: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Heavy Gravity] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Gravity Pole: Rotation
attributes.description:
* Able to change direction

* Duration and Strike gap halves

* Does not pull the enemy
